page: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. This x86_64 architecture server features 20 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 10 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 160.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 768 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25% in stress-ng tests. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and compression tasks generally perform in the average tier. For instance, the instance achieves average ratings in Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Redis SET operations. Large-scale LLM inference tasks represent a performance tradeoff, with prompt processing for a 70B model scoring in the poor tier, though text generation for smaller 135M models remains strong.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E20ads_v5 offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8:1, making it a resource-dense option for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of higher vCPU counts. The inclusion of 768 GB of local storage provides a built-in storage buffer. This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, caching layers, and moderate-scale data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 20 dedicated vCPUs and 160.0 GB of RAM, running on an AMD EPYC 7763 processor at 3.525 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance provides 10 physical cores with hyper-threading and includes 768 GB of local storage. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth results. While small-model LLM text generation performs well, large-model inference shows a clear performance tradeoff. The high 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this instance qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive applications. It is suited for database operations, memory-cached workloads, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v5 is an AMD EPYC-powered virtual machine with 20 vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local storage for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, high-density RAM, and local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 20-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz
Equipped with 160.0 GB of RAM, providing an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio
Includes 768 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage
Strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
Suited for database operations, caching layers, and memory-intensive applications
